label: AI-chatt — OpenAI
summary: Streaming chat assistant powered by OpenAI via the Vercel AI SDK. Provides a server route that streams completions and a client chat UI that the codegen LLM is free to restyle. Use when the site needs a customer-facing assistant, a product Q&A widget, or a guided onboarding chatbot.
summarySv: En chattassistent på sajten som svarar besökarna direkt, driven av OpenAI. Passar kundfrågor, vägledning och enklare support; utan riktig nyckel körs demoläge där chatten ger trovärdiga låtsassvar tills en OpenAI-nyckel läggs in.

envVars.purpose: Server-side OpenAI API authentication. Find it at platform.openai.com/api-keys. Tagged 'feature-runtime': the chat route now degrades gracefully (mock: canned) — when the key is missing or a preview stub it streams a canned demo reply over the same UI-message-stream protocol instead of calling OpenAI, so F3 reports a warning rather than blocking the build.
